title: useLocalStorage
description: Manages state synchronized with localStorage, keeping data persistent across sessions.

`,(0,n.jsx)(t,{name:"use-local-storage",code:`"use client";\r
import { useState, useCallback, useEffect } from "react";\r
import { useWindowEvent } from "./use-window-event";\r
\r
export type StorageType = "localStorage" | "sessionStorage";\r
\r
export interface StorageProperties<T> {\r
  key: string;\r
  initialValue?: T;\r
  getInitialValueInEffect?: boolean;\r
  serialize?(value: T): string;\r
  deserialize?(value: string | undefined): T;\r
}\r
\r
function serializeJSON<T>(value: T, hookName: string) {\r
  try {\r
    return JSON.stringify(value);\r
  } catch (error: any) {\r
    throw new Error(\`\${hookName}: Failed to serialize the value\`, error);\r
  }\r
}\r
\r
function deserializeJSON(value: string | undefined) {\r
  try {\r
    return value && JSON.parse(value);\r
  } catch {\r
    return value;\r
  }\r
}\r
\r
function createStorageHandler(type: StorageType) {\r
  const getItem = (key: string) => {\r
    try {\r
      return window[type].getItem(key);\r
    } catch (error) {\r
      console.warn("use-local-storage: Failed to get value from storage, localStorage is blocked", error);\r
      return null;\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  const setItem = (key: string, value: string) => {\r
    try {\r
      window[type].setItem(key, value);\r
    } catch (error: any) {\r
      console.warn("use-local-storage: Failed to set value to storage, localStorage is blocked", error);\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  const removeItem = (key: string) => {\r
    try {\r
      window[type].removeItem(key);\r
    } catch (error: any) {\r
      console.warn("use-local-storage: Failed to remove value from storage, localStorage is blocked", error);\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  return { getItem, setItem, removeItem };\r
}\r
\r
export function createStorage<T>(type: StorageType, hookName: string) {\r
  const eventName = type === "localStorage" ? "oeri-local-storage" : "oeri-session-storage";\r
  const { getItem, setItem, removeItem } = createStorageHandler(type);\r
\r
  return function useStorage({ key, initialValue = undefined, getInitialValueInEffect = true, deserialize = deserializeJSON, serialize = (value: T) => serializeJSON(value, hookName) }: StorageProperties<T>) {\r
    const readStorageValue = useCallback(\r
      (skipStorage?: boolean): T => {\r
        let storageBlockedOrSkipped;\r
\r
        try {\r
          storageBlockedOrSkipped = typeof window === "undefined" || !(type in window) || window[type] === null || !!skipStorage;\r
        } catch (_e) {\r
          storageBlockedOrSkipped = true;\r
        }\r
\r
        if (storageBlockedOrSkipped) {\r
          return initialValue as T;\r
        }\r
\r
        const storageValue = getItem(key);\r
        return storageValue !== null ? deserialize(storageValue) : (initialValue as T);\r
      },\r
      [key, initialValue]\r
    );\r
\r
    const [value, setValue] = useState<T>(readStorageValue(getInitialValueInEffect));\r
\r
    const setStorageValue = useCallback(\r
      (val: T | ((prevState: T) => T)) => {\r
        if (val instanceof Function) {\r
          setValue(current => {\r
            const result = val(current);\r
            setItem(key, serialize(result));\r
            window.dispatchEvent(\r
              new CustomEvent(eventName, {\r
                detail: { key, value: val(current) }\r
              })\r
            );\r
            return result;\r
          });\r
        } else {\r
          setItem(key, serialize(val));\r
          window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent(eventName, { detail: { key, value: val } }));\r
          setValue(val);\r
        }\r
      },\r
      [key]\r
    );\r
\r
    const removeStorageValue = useCallback(() => {\r
      removeItem(key);\r
      window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent(eventName, { detail: { key, value: initialValue } }));\r
    }, []);\r
\r
    useWindowEvent("storage", event => {\r
      if (event.storageArea === window[type] && event.key === key) {\r
        setValue(deserialize(event.newValue ?? undefined));\r
      }\r
    });\r
\r
    useWindowEvent(eventName, event => {\r
      if (event.detail.key === key) {\r
        setValue(event.detail.value);\r
      }\r
    });\r
\r
    useEffect(() => {\r
      if (initialValue !== undefined && value === undefined) {\r
        setStorageValue(initialValue);\r
      }\r
    }, [initialValue, value, setStorageValue]);\r
\r
    useEffect(() => {\r
      const val = readStorageValue();\r
      if (val !== undefined) setStorageValue(val);\r
    }, []);\r
\r
    return [value === undefined ? initialValue : value, setStorageValue, removeStorageValue] as [T, (val: T | ((prevState: T) => T)) => void, () => void];\r
  };\r
}\r
\r
export function useLocalStorage<T = string>(props: StorageProperties<T>) {\r
  return createStorage<T>("localStorage", "use-local-storage")(props);\r
}\r
\r
export const readLocalStorageValue = readValue("localStorage");\r
\r
export function readValue(type: StorageType) {\r
  const { getItem } = createStorageHandler(type);\r
\r
  return function read<T>({ key, initialValue, deserialize = deserializeJSON }: StorageProperties<T>) {\r
    let storageBlockedOrSkipped;\r
\r
    try {\r
      storageBlockedOrSkipped = typeof window === "undefined" || !(type in window) || window[type] === null;\r
    } catch (_e) {\r
      storageBlockedOrSkipped = true;\r
    }\r
\r
    if (storageBlockedOrSkipped) {\r
      return initialValue as T;\r
    }\r
\r
    const storageValue = getItem(key);\r
    return storageValue !== null ? deserialize(storageValue) : (initialValue as T);\r
  };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-local-storage.ts"})]})}function d(r={}){let{wrapper:e}=r.components||{};return e?(0,n.jsx)(e,{...r,children:(0,n.jsx)(c,{...r})}):c(r)}function V(r,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+r+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return w(T);})();
